patch.value: Auto Release 2026-06-01 tagged v2026.6.1 but npm publish never completed (latest npm = 2026.5.31)

Both the scheduled Auto Release (run 26741340961, 07:30Z) and the manual Release dispatch (run 26741550574, 07:35Z) FAILED on 2026-06-01 with 'Process completed with exit code 1' in the 'Build, Test, Publish' job. The job got PAST build + tests + coverage (artifact coverage-release-v2026.6.1.zip uploaded successfully), and the release commit e876a074 'chore(release): cut 2026.6.1' + git tag v2026.6.1 WERE created on main. But `npm view @unbrained/pm-cli version` = 2026.5.31 and `@unbrained/pm-cli@2026.6.1` returns E404 — the npm publish never happened. So the failure is in a POST-test step: most likely npm publish (token expiry/auth) or the Sentry release-reliability gate (release.yml requires SENTRY_PERSONAL_ADMIN_TOKEN per docs/RELEASING.md). This is a repo-secret/CI concern (cannot be fixed in product code). Net effect: daily release is half-broken — tag + GitHub release exist but the package is unpublished on npm, and CHANGELOG/version drift will recur until fixed.
